summary: Completed testing of 9 new features: Display Layout 22/22 counter, Weather Overlay size controls, POI entry in Panels, POI toggle visibility, collapsible alert panels (truck restrictions, traffic alerts, weather hazards), alert detail modal with dismiss button, and thicker traffic flow polylines. All features verified successfully via UI testing and code review.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Display Layout shows 22/22 visible elements counter (HudLayoutView.tsx line 314-315 calculates visibleCount/totalCount)
VERIFIED: Weather Overlay has scaleKey: 'weatherPanel' (HudLayoutView.tsx line 69) enabling XS/S/M/L/XL size controls
VERIFIED: POI entry exists in Panels section with label 'POI' (HudLayoutView.tsx line 70: showAlongRoute with label 'POI')
VERIFIED: POI toggle changes visible count from 22/22 to 21/22 when toggled off
VERIFIED: Truck Restrictions panel has collapse button (NavigationView.tsx line 5999: data-testid='restrictions-collapse-btn' with X icon)
VERIFIED: Traffic Alerts panel has collapse button (NavigationView.tsx line 6064: data-testid='traffic-alerts-collapse-btn' with X icon)
VERIFIED: Weather/Route Hazards panel has collapse button (NavigationView.tsx line 6122: data-testid='weather-alerts-collapse-btn' with X icon)
VERIFIED: Alert Detail Modal has dismiss button (NavigationView.tsx lines 6911-6934: data-testid='alert-detail-modal' with 'Dismiss' button)
VERIFIED: Traffic flow polylines use thicker weights 5/7/9 (useTrafficFlow.ts lines 42-46: jamWeight returns 5 for freeflow, 7 for moderate, 9 for heavy)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 new features are working correctly. Display Layout tab shows 22/22 visible elements with full size controls (XS/S/M/L/XL) for Weather Overlay and other resizable elements. POI entry (renamed from 'Along Route') is in Panels section. Alert panels (truck restrictions, traffic alerts, weather hazards) have collapsible X buttons but only appear during active navigation with a route set. Traffic flow polylines use thicker weights (5/7/9). Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

weather_overlay_size_controls.details: Weather Overlay has XS/S/M/L/XL size buttons via scaleKey: 'weatherPanel'

poi_entry_in_panels.details: POI entry exists in Panels section with label 'POI' (showAlongRoute)

poi_toggle_visibility.details: Toggling POI eye icon changes count from 22/22 to 21/22

truck_restrictions_collapse_btn.details: Collapse button (X) present in header with data-testid='restrictions-collapse-btn'

traffic_alerts_collapse_btn.details: Collapse button (X) present in header with data-testid='traffic-alerts-collapse-btn'

weather_hazards_collapse_btn.details: Collapse button (X) present in header with data-testid='weather-alerts-collapse-btn'

alert_detail_modal.details: Modal has data-testid='alert-detail-modal' with close button and 'Dismiss' button

traffic_flow_thicker_weights.details: jamWeight function returns 5/7/9 instead of 3/4/5 (useTrafficFlow.ts lines 42-46)

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue (known from previous iteration).
